Cannabis Co. Flora Growth Wants To Allow Customers To Pay With Bitcoin As It Shatters $100K Mark
data.description: Flora Growth Corp. (NASDAQ: FLGC) (FSE: 7301) explores integrating Bitcoin as an accepted payment method across its business platforms, the company said on Wednesday.The move aligns with the company's commitment to innovation and meeting the evolving preferences of its global customer base.

data.title: Why Is Protara Therapeutics Stock Skyrocketing Over 100% On Thursday?
data.description: Protara Therapeutics reports promising Phase 2 results for TARA-002 in bladder cancer patients, highlighting high response rates and strong safety data.

data.title: Jack Daniel's And Old Forester Parent Brown-Forman Stock Soars Thursday - Here's Why
data.description: Brown-Forman beats Q2 earnings estimates, but reports a 4% slump in gross profit; raises dividend and updates FY25 outlook.
